name: Connor Heffler Park/East School
description:
Lines for 6 courts with 5 portable nets. Courts open at 8am and lights are on until 9pm. In winter the courts are dedicated pickleball every day. In Spring-Fall, the courts are dedicated pickleball MWTFS. Tuesdays and Sundays, tennis has priority. 
The courts are adjacent to a preschool which has off-street parking. Please drive with caution in the lot!
open_play_schedule: 8am-9pm groups are asked to play no longer than one hour if other people are waiting to use a court. Friendly round-robin groups meet here regularly. All are welcome.

open_play_schedule: Sudbury Recreation offers various ways to play. Our outdoor courts are currently a first come first serve court for either basketball or pickleball. fees: Fee required — 90 min court reserved for you and 3 friends indoors $25R/$35NR, 10-week 2-hour session $60R/$65NR, and Clinics $65R/$70NR for beginner and improver level clinics (more to come soon).

Suggested donation to support provided gear is $1.00 per day or $35.00 per season (May-September).  Donations can be made to lockbox located at field. 

https://sites.google.com/view/westfordpickleball/home

Notes: Bring your own chair and water. Bring your own balls. If you forget to bring balls they can be purchased at the field for a suggested donation of $5.00 each.

name: The Marcus Lewis Tennis Center
description:
Pickleball is held at both our MLTC East (10 Granite Road in Acton) as well as our MLTC West Facility (102 Nonset Path in Acton).
You do not need to be a member to participate. A court may be reserved up to 7-days in advance, but keep in mind that there is a 24-hour cancellation policy.  Paddles and balls are provided by the club if you do not have your own. 
Visit: https://marcuslewistenniscenter.com/pickleball/ to learn more
open_play_schedule: Open 7days/week 7am - 10:30pm. The schedule varies by season so please check before visiting.

name: Wells Ave Y, West Suburban YMCA
description:
The West Suburban YMCA has been an integral part of the Pickleball community in Newton for years, with three courts available at the Church St location and now an additional 6 courts available at the new Wells Ave location. We love how passionate, dedicated, and welcoming the Y's pickleball players (picklers) are and can see through their active involvement why we are called "The Pickleball Hub".

Picklers at the West Suburban YMCA play on indoor courts with multiple court and location options, truly making it a year-round "hub". Drop in pickleball play is offered 7 days a week, along with seasonal leagues and clinics. Check our pickleball page for hours at www.wsymca.org/programs-classes/sports/pickle-ball.

Free for WSYMCA Members
Non-Members must pay the guest pass fee ($15 or $20)
open_play_schedule: See website for open play hours
